settings.heading: What makes Jolene Coffee different from other cold brews?
settings.content: Our slow-brew process takes hours, not minutes, extracting maximum flavor while maintaining smoothness. We use only fair trade, non-GMO certified beans and keep our ingredient list clean—just coffee and water for our Black, or the addition of creamy oat milk for our Latte.

settings.heading: How do I prepare the cold brew concentrate?
settings.content: Mix one part Jolene Black Cold Brew with one part water for traditional strength, or adjust to your taste preference. You can also mix with milk, oat milk, or enjoy it straight over ice. Our Oat Milk Latte is ready to drink straight from the bottle.

settings.heading: Are your products organic and ethically sourced?
settings.content: All our coffee is Fair Trade Certified and Non-GMO verified. While not certified organic, our sourcing partners follow sustainable farming practices that prioritize environmental stewardship and fair wages for coffee farmers.

settings.heading: How long does opened cold brew last?
settings.content: Once opened, consume within 7-10 days for best flavor and quality. Store in the refrigerator and shake before each use. Our cold brew maintains its smooth taste throughout this period when properly stored.

settings.heading: Do you offer subscription or bulk ordering?
settings.content: Yes! Subscribe and save 15% on every delivery with free shipping. You can adjust frequency, skip deliveries, or cancel anytime. We also offer mix packs and bulk options for offices or events.

settings.heading: Is the Oat Milk Latte suitable for dietary restrictions?
settings.content: Our Oat Milk Latte is dairy-free, gluten-free, and Non-GMO. It's perfect for those avoiding dairy or following plant-based diets, while still delivering the creamy, indulgent coffee experience you're craving.

settings.heading: Born from Coffee Obsession
settings.content: What started as a quest for the perfect home cold brew became Jolene Coffee. After years of experimenting with brewing methods and sourcing, we discovered that great coffee doesn't need to be complicated—it just needs to be done right.

settings.heading: The Search for Perfect Coffee
settings.content: Jolene Coffee began with a simple frustration: why was it so hard to find cold brew that tasted as good at home as it did at the best coffee shops? After countless experiments with brewing times, bean origins, and ratios, we perfected our slow-brew method that extracts maximum flavor while maintaining the smooth, balanced taste that makes every sip memorable.
I've tried every cold brew brand, but Jolene's Black is in a league of its own. Smooth, bold, never bitter—and I love that it's concentrated so I can make it exactly how I like it.
settings.title: Marcus T., Strategy Director

settings.content: The Oat Milk Latte tastes like it came straight from my favorite café. Creamy, perfectly balanced, and I feel good knowing it's ethically sourced. My morning routine is complete.
settings.title: Elena R., Yoga Instructor

settings.content: Finally, a coffee brand that delivers on both taste and values. The fair trade certification matters to me, and the fact that it tastes incredible is just the perfect bonus.
